description:
🕒 09:30–14:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morikaori-rose/

Surrounded by pesticide-free roses and herbs, you'll prepare a gentle, nourishing lunch together using rose petals and fresh seasonal vegetables. Supported by the sounds of the kantele (a stringed instrument) and rose water, this eco-tour invites you to connect with nature through all five senses and feel your body relax from within.

【Fee】¥4,000 per person (includes guide, ingredients, insurance, etc.)

【Capacity】8 people

【Guide】Kaori Mori

【Please bring】Mask, apron, triangular headscarf, writing materials
location: 集合 森香織宅（飯能市笠縫）※詳細は申込後 西武池袋線「飯能駅」から徒歩20分/「東飯能駅」から徒歩15分
summary: Relax in the Rose Garden: Rose lunch and eco-tour
